methodology.gap: Per-vendor latency_ms is NOT exposed in /v1/verify or /v1/demo_verify AttackerReport schema (fields: vendor, model, found_issue, reasoning). Total pipeline latency measured; per-vendor breakdown requires upstream schema change: add latency_ms to AttackerReport and populate it in _run_attackers() from the individual adapter .evaluate() timing.
